title: Socotra YAML Config
description: Schema for socotra.yaml — .NET solution scaffolding configuration. Defines the desired state of a .NET project: solution structure, modules, layers, architecture patterns, and scaffolding templates.

socotra.description: Root configuration object. All fields are nested under this top-level key.

version.description: Schema version. Currently versions 1, 1.0, and 1.1 are supported. The CLI validates this at runtime.

solution.description: Defines the .NET solution and its global project settings.

modules.description: List of business modules. Each module produces a set of related projects organized into layers.

shared.description: Shared projects referenced by modules. Not tied to any specific module.

host.description: Host/entry-point project that references module API projects.

solutionConfig.description: Defines the .NET solution file and global project defaults.

name.description: Solution name. Used for the .sln filename and solution folder structure.

rootNamespace.description: Root namespace for all generated code. Defaults to the solution name if not specified.

dotnetVersion.description: Target framework moniker (TFM). Validated by the CLI at runtime.

outputPath.description: Directory where projects are created, relative to the solution root.

architectureConfig.description: Architecture pattern configuration with optional layer constraint enforcement.

pattern.description: Architecture pattern that determines the solution structure.

enforceLayerConstraints.description: When true, validates layer references against allowedDependencies and reports violations.

allowedDependencies.description: List of allowed dependency rules. Each rule defines a from/to glob pair.

dependencyRule.description: Defines an allowed dependency path using glob patterns.

from.description: Glob pattern matching the source project or layer.

to.description: Glob pattern matching the target project or layer.

moduleConfig.description: Defines a business module. Each module produces a set of related projects organized into layers.

name.description: Module name. Must be unique across all modules (case-insensitive). Used in project naming and solution folder structure.

namespace.description: Override namespace for this module's projects. Defaults to solution.rootNamespace.moduleName.

description.description: Human-readable description of the module's purpose.

layers.description: List of layer definitions within this module. Each layer produces one .NET project.

layerConfig.description: Defines a single project within a module, corresponding to a logical layer.

name.description: Layer name. Must be PascalCase and unique within the module (case-insensitive).

type.description: Project type that determines the .NET template to use.

namespace.description: Override namespace for this layer's project. Defaults to module.namespace.layerName.

references.description: Project references. Supports exact names, glob patterns, module.layer syntax, and relative paths.

packages.description: NuGet package references. Format: PackageId:Version (e.g. FluentValidation:11.9.2).

templates.description: Template names to apply to this project on creation.

properties.description: Custom key-value pairs passed to templates for conditional logic.

sharedProjectConfig.description: Defines a shared project that can be referenced by any module or layer.

name.description: Project name. Must be unique across all shared projects and modules.

type.description: Project type that determines the .NET template to use.

templates.description: Template names to apply to this shared project.

packages.description: NuGet package references for this shared project.

hostConfig.description: Defines the host/entry-point project that references module API projects.

type.description: Project type. Typically WebApi or Worker.

references.description: Project references to module API layers or other projects.

templates.description: Template names to apply to the host project.

scaffoldingConfig.description: Custom scaffolding templates and shared variables for code generation.

templates.description: Custom template definitions for project-specific generation.

variables.description: Global variables available to all custom templates during scaffolding.

name.description: Template name referenced in layer or host templates arrays.

source.description: Source path or URL for the template.

outputPath.description: Override output path relative to the project directory.

packageRef.description: NuGet package reference in the format PackageId:Version. The CLI validates the format at runtime.

projectType.description: .NET project type. Each value maps to a specific `dotnet new` template.

architecturePattern.description: Architecture pattern determining the solution structure and default layers.

stringMap.description: Dynamic string key-value map. Keys and values are user-defined.
